change_summary.expected_result: Current-turn Office attachments remain resolvable after CodeAPI rotates stale session/file references, pre-parse is bounded and abort-aware, and no-content stops do not persist a successful blank assistant message.
functions: Resolve current Office attachments against fresh CodeAPI priming results
Bound Office pre-parse to 45 seconds and propagate request aborts
Preserve semantic-empty and early-abort persistence guards
limitations: Legacy priming results without source_file_id use exact unique filenames; duplicate filenames fail visibly instead of being guessed
The pre-parse manifest is bounded and does not replace later full-file code analysis
change_summary.reason: The rolled-back gate compared mutable CodeAPI identifiers saved at upload time with fresh identifiers returned after a stale-session re-upload, causing valid Office files to be rejected before model execution.
change_summary.risk: A regression in agent initialization could block Office turns before the provider call. Deployment is limited to LibreChat-API with timestamped backups and immediate rollback on syntax, health, or boundary failure.
